CustomField.description: This will be updated by a L.FLOW 4530 as it updates daily. Users will not edit this field. The V.RULE will allow the Flow to run and edit historical months in ENTRY, but not users
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This will be updated by a L.FLOW 4530 as it updates daily. Users will not edit this field. The V.RULE will allow the Flow to run and edit historical months in ENTRY, but not users
CustomField.label: fxFlowEditTime
